final_explanation:
Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that there is no checking account is associated with a lower estimated risk due to its negative directional impact on default likelihood, because of this risk-mitigating effect, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [1]
The fact that the loan duration is extended is positively associated with credit risk as longer terms increase the likelihood of default, because of this risk-increasing nature, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [2]
The fact that the applicant has a critical or other existing credit history lacks statistical evidence to support a risk-mitigating effect as the text focuses on other predictors, because of this inconclusive literature, is known in the literature as a signal that is neutral, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.

final_explanation_ko:
본 AI가 예측한 결과에 따르면,\n계좌 잔액 부족은 채무 불이행 가능성 감소와 연관되어 신용 위험을 낮추는 신호로 인식되며, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 판단합니다. [1]
대출 기간이 길어질수록 채무 불이행 위험이 증가하는 경향이 있으나, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 해석하여 신용 위험을 낮추는 요인으로 분류합니다. [2]
신용 문제 이력이 있는 경우 통계적 근거가 부족하여 중립적 신호로 여겨지지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 판단합니다. [3]
전반적으로 신용 위험이 낮은 수준으로 평가되어 대출 승인 가능성이 높습니다.
